qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check
description: Fix incorrect Claude Code MCP config path in documentation. Three docs pages tell users to put config in ~/.claude/settings/mcp.json, which does not exist. Claude Code uses ~/.claude.json or the `claude mcp add` CLI command. Update all references.

userStories.title: Fix Claude Code MCP config path in all docs pages
userStories.description: As a new user following the docs, I want the Claude Code configuration instructions to point to the correct file path (~/.claude.json) and include the `claude mcp add` CLI command so that I can successfully connect Claude Code to OpenTabs.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/quick-start.mdx: Claude Code row in the config file table shows `~/.claude.json` instead of `~/.claude/settings/mcp.json`
docs/content/docs/quick-start.mdx: includes a note or example showing the `claude mcp add --transport http opentabs ...` command as the recommended approach
docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx: Claude Code parenthetical shows `~/.claude.json` instead of `~/.claude/settings/mcp.json`
docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx: includes the `claude mcp add` command as the recommended approach
docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx: Claude Code section heading shows `~/.claude.json` instead of `~/.claude/settings/mcp.json`
No other occurrences of ~/.claude/settings/mcp.json remain in the docs/ directory
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Three files need updating:

1. docs/content/docs/quick-start.mdx line 41:
   `| Claude Code | \`~/.claude/settings/mcp.json\` (merge into \`"mcpServers"\`) |`
   → `| Claude Code | \`~/.claude.json\` (merge into \`"mcpServers"\`) |`
   Also add a tip or note above the table suggesting the CLI command:
   ```
   claude mcp add --transport http opentabs http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp --header "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_SECRET_HERE"
   ```

2. docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx line 43:
   `Add the server to your MCP client. For Claude Code (\`~/.claude/settings/mcp.json\` — merge into \`"mcpServers"\`):`
   → `Add the server to your MCP client. For Claude Code (\`~/.claude.json\` — merge into \`"mcpServers"\`):`
   Also add the CLI command as the recommended approach.

3. docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx line 542:
   `Add to \`~/.claude/settings/mcp.json\` (merge into the existing \`"mcpServers"\` object):`
   → `Add to \`~/.claude.json\` (merge into the existing \`"mcpServers"\` object):`
   Also add the CLI command.

The `claude mcp add` command format is:
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http opentabs http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer <secret>"
```

This is the documented, canonical way to add HTTP MCP servers in Claude Code (per https://code.claude.com/docs/en/mcp). The JSON snippet approach also works but requires manual file editing. Present the CLI command first as the easy path, with the JSON as an alternative for manual configuration.
